items.summary: Remove the authentication check in the backend that prevents anonymous users from adding guestbook entries. Any visitor should be able to submit a guestbook entry without being signed in via Internet Identity.

Update the AddEntryPage so that authentication is no longer required to submit the form. Remove any sign-in gate, error message, or disabled state that blocks submission for unauthenticated users. The form should be fully accessible and submittable without logging in.
